summary: EXP-192 closes the major engagement-with-current-dome hole in WIN-012 detail_evidence. A new dedicated paragraph (paragraph 2 of the rewrite) explicitly acknowledges the dome's current WIN-011 "CONFIRMED (Mechanism Contested)" framing — including the concession that gravitational shielding is "ruled out" per Unnikrishnan 2001 and the retreat to a "thermal-tilt loophole" — and then turns that concession into ammunition: if the -6.5 uGal Mohe signal is a thermal-tilt artifact of the LaCoste-Romberg D spring gravimeter, then kappa's denominator is instrument noise, not gravity, and a "magnetic-gravity coupling" between a real magnetic field and an instrument artifact is not a physical coupling constant. Explicitly flags the WIN-011 vs WIN-012 self-contradiction on the dome's own current live site.
